T1.label: Tier 1 — Day-trip essentials
T1.description: For local field trips, day trips, single overnight stays, and in-state travel

T2.label: Tier 2 — Multi-day domestic
T2.description: For multi-day trips, out-of-state travel, multiple lodging sites, and regional tours

T3.label: Tier 3 — International/Complex
T3.description: For international travel, study abroad programs, mission trips, and high-risk activities

bgDomestic.label: Background Check (US)
bgDomestic.description: U.S. background checks for adults. Consent collected after checkout.

bgInternational.label: Background Check (International)
bgInternational.description: International background checks for adults with international travel history

translation.label: Translation Pack
translation.description: Translate trip packet into Spanish, French, Mandarin, or 20+ languages

commsKit.label: Parent Communications Kit
commsKit.description: Automated email and SMS updates to parents during trip

debrief.label: Debrief & Binder
debrief.description: Post-trip incident review with safety analyst
